diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -59,8 +59,10 @@
         if len(image.shape) == 3:  # Single image: HWC

             image = image.unsqueeze(0)  # Add batch dimension: B, H, W, C

             single_input = True

-        else:  # Batched input: B, H, W, C

+        elif len(image.shape) == 4:  # Batched input: B, H, W, C

             single_input = False

+        else:

+            raise ValueError(f"Unexpected image shape: {image.shape}")

         

         # Permute to NCHW format for Conv2d

         image = image.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).float() / 255.0  # Normalize image

@@ -80,8 +82,10 @@
         direction_embedded = self.direction_embedding(direction.long())

         

         # Ensure both tensors have compatible shapes for concatenation

-        if single_input and image_features.shape[0] != direction_embedded.shape[0]:

-            direction_embedded = direction_embedded.unsqueeze(0)

+        # image_features shape: [batch_size, flat_size]

+        # direction_embedded shape: [batch_size, embedding_size]

+        if image_features.shape[0] != direction_embedded.shape[0]:

+            raise ValueError(f"Batch size mismatch: image_features {image_features.shape[0]}, direction_embedded {direction_embedded.shape[0]}")

         

         # Combine features

         combined = torch.cat([image_features, direction_embedded], dim=1)

@@ -95,4 +99,4 @@
             action_logits = action_logits.squeeze(0)

             state_values = state_values.squeeze(0)

         

-        return action_logits, state_values

+        return action_logits, state_values
